ideation: This animation sequence depicts the act of setting up a tent.  The robot will mimic the actions of placing poles into the ground and securing the tent fabric. Since the robot has no hands, the animation will focus on the overall arm movements that suggest these actions. The sequence will use a combination of both arms to create a sense of collaborative effort.

frames.beat: arms reach down, preparing the ground
arms lift poles upward, setting the structure
arms adjust the frame, steadying the poles
arms lower to the sides, tent is pitched
